intro.title: A Birthday Announcement
intro.narrator_text: Dearest reader, it has come to my attention that a most remarkable woman celebrates her birth this very day. A lady of extraordinary grace, sharp wit, and a beauty that would leave even the ton speechless. If you are reading this, know that you are celebrated beyond measure...

envelopes.message: Every moment with you feels like the grandest ball of the season. You are my favourite dance, my dearest partner, my everything.
If Lady Whistledown were to write of us, she would say ours is the greatest love story the ton has ever witnessed.
You are the reason I believe in fairy tales, in destiny, in a love that transcends time and place.
Happy Birthday, my love. May this year bring you every joy your beautiful heart deserves.

portrait.name: [Her Name]
portrait.notice: It is with the greatest pleasure that this correspondent brings to the attention of the ton a lady of singular distinction. Miss [Her Name] — whose grace has been remarked upon in every drawing room from here to the furthest reaches of the season — possesses qualities so rare as to defy adequate description. She is possessed of a warmth that makes all who enter her company feel instantly at ease, a laugh that has been known to lift the spirits of even the most melancholy of souls, and an intelligence that is, frankly, rather inconvenient for everyone else in the room. She faces each day with a courage that this writer finds most admirable, and loves with a depth that quite takes one's breath away. In short, dearest reader, she is extraordinary. And she is, without question, the finest person this correspondent has ever had the privilege of observing.

traits.label: Warmth
traits.description: The kind that fills every room she enters

traits.label: Courage
traits.description: She faces the world without flinching

traits.label: Kindness
traits.description: Deeper than she will ever admit

traits.label: Heart
traits.description: The most generous one I know

reminders.caption: A good book on a rainy day
